LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF FIRESIDE THRIFT CO.'S HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION IS DENIED. JUDGMENT DEBTOR HAS NOT PRESENTED EVIDENCE SUFFICIENT TO SHOW THAT ALL OF HER INCOME IS NECESSARY FOR HER SUPPORT. JUDGMENT DEBTOR SHALL CONTINUE TO PAY $100 PER MONTH TOWARDS THE JUDGMENT. $100 OF THE FUNDS BEING HELD SHALL BE RELEASED TO THE JUDGMENT CREDITOR. THE REMAINING AMOUNT SHALL BE RELEASED TO THE JUDGMENT DEBTOR. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: MARLA MILLER; CLERK: LESLEY FISCELLA, NOT REPORTED.

calendar.matters:
Notice Of Opposition To Claim Of Exemption Hearing
Off Calendar Sep-04-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES - CHRISTY A. MCDOWELL, TEL. NO. 1-925-852-3518, DEFENDANT APPEARING IN PRO PER;
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER

RULING - THE MATTER WAS DISCUSSED. The court vacated its tentative ruling and ruled as follows: Claim Of Exemption Hearing of Defendant Chrristy A. Mcdowell is granted by the court. Defendant is unemployed at this time. Order signed. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter : Melanie Gheno, CSR # 7489

Plaintiff Fireside Thrift Co. Notice Of Hearing On Claim Of Exemption
Off Calendar Dec-13-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Plaintiff Fireside Thrift Co.'s Hearing On Claim Of Exemption is denied. Judgment debtor has not presented evidence sufficient to show that all of her income is necessary for her support. Judgment debtor shall continue to pay $100 per month towards the judgment. $100 of the funds being held shall be released to the judgment creditor. The remaining amount shall be released to the judgment debtor. Order signed in open Court. Judge: Marla Miller; Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Not reported.

Notice Of Hearing On Claim Of Exemption
Off Calendar Dec-13-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

NO APPEARANCES. THE COURT ADOPTS THE TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS:

PLAINTIFF FIRESIDE THRIFT CO.'S Notice Of Hearing On Claim Of Exemption is transferred to be heard in Department 302 at 9:30 a.m. Rebecca Woodson, Judge Pro-Tem, Jacqueline Alameda, Clerk, Not Reported. =302/JPT

Notice Of Hearing On Claim Of Exemption
Off Calendar Jul-07-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION.

RULING: No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling - CLAIM OF EXEMPTION GRANTED. DEFENDANT TO PAY $100 PER MONTH TO JUDGMENT CREDITOR. ALSO, SHERIFF TO RELEASE $390.00 TO JUDGMENT CREDITOR. Order signed. Judge: Loretta M. Giorgi; Not reported

STATUS CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-15-2001 Sweep; Adjudicated
